title: Soul Link
description: Adds the Soul Link enchantment so you don't lose your items on death.
body:
This data pack adds a new Soul Link enchantment.
This enchantment returns the item with this enchantment to you upon your death.

Requires general [GalLab resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gallab)

<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/8RIQXL7Jp3w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Since version 1.6 (1.21+) it now uses the enchantment system instead of a custom item. So enchanting items is done through an anvil.
##

There are three variants of this enchantment:
- **Soul Link** - the normal version of the enchantment. The item will always return to you after death.
Can be found in chests in Ancient City, with a small chance to be fished in the Deep Dark biome, or as a drop from Warden.

- **Weak Soul Link** - Weakened version of Soul Link. Enchantment level will decrease with each death. Can transform into Unstable Soul Link. Can be found in chests in Ancient City, with a small chance to be fished in any biome.

- **Unstable Soul Link** - A special version of Soul Link that will save the player's entire inventory, then the item with this enchantment will be destroyed after the player's death.

To obtain this enchantment on any item, drop a Resonating Soul / Weak Resonating Soul with the desired item on the Enchanting Table.

The item will be returned even if you die in lava or the void.
